title: Easy Elytra Crafting
description: This mod allows you to craft an elytra without entering the End. To craft an elytra, you need phantom membranes and a stick!
body:
This mod allows you to craft an elytra without entering the End. To craft an elytra, you need phantom membranes and a stick!

![Elytra Wing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a78394bd8986861daf544c913489bd35686ede.png)

![Elytra Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f77c8f0979a9e3004852b7063afce785be85dc44.png)

Items needed to craft an Elytra:
- 2 Elytra wings
- 1 stick
- 1 membrane
Items needed to craft an Elytra wing:
- 5 phantom membranes for each wing

 

Available on:
- Forge 1.20.1
- NeoForge 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8
- Fabric 1.20.1

 

ATTENTION

You can definitely add this mod to your modpack.
